refnamediv.refpurpose: Negatively acknowledges consumption of a message

refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.description; &style.oop; (method):
public boolStomp::nack mixedmsg arrayheaders
&style.procedural;:
boolstomp_nack resourcelink mixedmsg arrayheaders
Sends a negative acknowledgment for a message, telling the server that the message was not consumed. This is the counterpart of Stomp::ack and requires a server that supports the STOMP NACK frame.
